underlying_goal: Batch fix two GitHub issues: #23 (widget config persistence after force stop) and #14 (status bar text color on light backgrounds), then commit/PR and review code comments
friction_detail: Initial fix for #23 was wrong; user provided more context revealing the real issue was Glance state corruption, not WorkManager scheduling.
brief_summary: User asked to batch fix two widget bugs, Claude fixed #14 (status bar) correctly first try but needed user correction on #23 (widget state corruption), then successfully created PRs for both and reviewed Sourcery comments.
